problems.title: openclaw.json corruption causing gateway crash and session loss
problems.rootCause: Concurrent write to openclaw.json during gateway restart — file written with truncated JSON. Gateway failed to parse config on next start. No atomic write protection on config file.
problems.workaround: Restore openclaw.json from git backup. Run: git checkout HEAD -- .openclaw/openclaw.json
problems.permanentFix: gateway-config-snapshot.sh + gateway-restore.sh implemented (CHG logged Day 17). Config now backed up before every change.
